title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers  | TechCrunch
summary: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026 | TechCrunch
summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.

title: Redwood Materials loses COO amid layoffs, restructuring
summary: Former Tesla executive Chris Lister is retiring, and at least three other VPs have left Redwood around the recent restructuring, TechCrunch has learned.
